name: cortex-wrappers-expand
title: ~/.cortex/scripts/ 加 ingest/search/save/refactor wrapper + lint --fix
description: 现 ~/.cortex/scripts/ 只 doctor/lint/fold/dashboard 4 调 claude wrapper. 加 4 新 wrapper 暴露完整 cortex 能力: 1) ingest.sh 调 cortex-ingest skill 处理 url/file/git, 2) search.sh 调 cortex-search skill 查询, 3) save.sh 调 cortex-save skill 落档 stdin, 4) refactor.sh 调 cortex-refactor skill 子命令. lint.sh 加 --fix flag 走交互修复模式 (cortex-lint skill AskUserQuestion). 改 install_wrappers.sh + 加 emit, 不动 mcp/ + hooks.
creator: nico
